context_text: <B> [ okay okay oh yeah oh yeah ] my brother my younger brother is a junior sophomore junior in college and he plays but he plays for double a school so we never really get to see him on tv so that's kind of depressing but you know / <A> right / <B> but my the we watch i do watch the last saturday in november the ohio state michigan game / <A> yeah / <B> big deal in my house my husband went to ohio state i'm a michigan alum / <A> wow / <B> it's like war you know so they finally started winning i think they've won twice in the last eleven years so you know that's a big deal and it's it's amazing how people in ohio are really big on the michigan ohio state rivalry when for michigan michigan state's more of a bigger rivalry i'd like to see those games on tv so / <A> uh-huh / <B> i think i watch more college i enjoy college games more than i do professional games / <A> mhm
